heading: Sadliers Crossing vs Salisbury — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sadliers Crossing, Queensland and Salisbury, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sadliers Crossing and Salisbury have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Sadliers Crossing or Salisbury safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sadliers Crossing has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Salisbury scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sadliers Crossing scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Salisbury scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sadliers Crossing or Salisbury?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sadliers Crossing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
